title: OB GYN Residency Scheduling | ACGME Compliant | Scheduling Wizard
description: OB GYN residency scheduling is complex. Our managed service delivers fully optimized, ACGME-compliant schedules to protect your program's accreditation.
h1: Guaranteed ACGME-Compliant OB GYN Residency Scheduling
paragraph: Protect your program's accreditation. Scheduling Wizard delivers mathematically guaranteed ACGME-compliant OB GYN residency scheduling as a managed service.

cta.title: Get Your OB GYN Schedule Done Right
cta.description: Join programs across 18 departments and 13 hospitals who trust Scheduling Wizard with their residency schedules.

faq.answer: Yes. ACGME compliance for OB GYN programs is mathematically enforced at schedule generation time, not manually checked after the fact. Scheduling Wizard's proprietary optimization engine has subspecialty-specific ACGME rules built in, including OB GYN-specific requirements. ACGME compliance is the most common question asked on Scheduling Wizard sales calls, and was a core design priority for the engine.
faq.question: Is Scheduling Wizard compliant with OB GYN ACGME duty hour rules?

faq.answer: Scheduling Wizard delivers finished schedules as ready-to-use Excel spreadsheets. Your program submits its constraints — rotation requirements, duty hour rules, resident preferences, call fairness targets — and receives completed Block, Call, Clinic, and Attending schedules. Those Excel files can then be uploaded directly to your existing viewing tools such as Amion or QGenda for day-to-day access.
faq.question: How does Scheduling Wizard deliver OB GYN residency schedules?

faq.answer: Scheduling Wizard produces Block and rotation schedules, Call schedules with fairness optimization, Clinic schedules, and Attending schedules. All four schedule types are optimized simultaneously so that changes in one automatically resolve dependencies across the others, eliminating the domino effect that occurs when OB GYN schedules are patched manually.
faq.question: What types of schedules does Scheduling Wizard produce for OB GYN programs?

faq.answer: Scheduling knowledge and program constraint configurations persist with Scheduling Wizard across chief rotations. When a new OB GYN chief takes over, they inherit a fully documented, working scheduling system instead of starting from scratch. This eliminates the institutional knowledge loss that occurs every year when an outgoing chief resident leaves the program.
faq.question: How does Scheduling Wizard handle the annual OB GYN chief resident transition?

faq.answer: No. Scheduling Wizard handles schedule creation and optimization, while Amion and QGenda serve as viewing and display tools. Many OB GYN programs use Scheduling Wizard alongside their existing Amion or QGenda account. Scheduling Wizard generates the optimized, compliant schedule and delivers it as an Excel file that programs upload directly to their preferred viewing platform.
faq.question: Does Scheduling Wizard replace Amion or QGenda for OB GYN programs?

faq.answer: OB GYN residency scheduling requires simultaneously satisfying ACGME duty hour rules specific to the specialty, equitable call distribution across residents, continuity clinic obligations, attending coverage alignment, and resident preferences such as vacation and elective requests. Managing all of these constraints manually in a spreadsheet leaves significant room for compliance errors, fairness disputes, and wasted time every scheduling cycle.
faq.question: Why is OB GYN residency scheduling difficult to manage manually?

items.title: Fair OB GYN Call Schedules Every Time
items.description: Algorithmically distribute overnight call, weekend, and holiday burden equitably across your OB GYN residents. Duty hour limits and post-call rest rules are enforced automatically at every step.

items.title: Knowledge Persists Across Chief Rotations
items.description: Your OB GYN program's scheduling rules, constraints, and configurations persist with Scheduling Wizard year over year. Incoming chiefs inherit a working, optimized system instead of starting from a blank spreadsheet.

items.description: Scheduling Wizard is not software your chief must learn to operate. Your program submits constraints and receives finished OB GYN schedules as Excel files ready to upload to Amion or QGenda for day-to-day viewing.

items.title: Resident Requests Built Into Every Schedule
items.description: Vacation requests, elective preferences, conference dates, and personal constraints from your OB GYN residents are treated as first-class inputs in the optimization — not manual patches added after the schedule is built.

features.title: Built for OB GYN Residency Programs

items.title: ACGME Compliance Keeps You Up

searchIntents: As a chief resident in OB GYN, I'm looking for a way to create compliant and fair rotation schedules for our residents without having to spend hours learning complicated scheduling software.
I need to ensure our OB GYN residency schedules meet ACGME requirements because any errors could delay our accreditation and impact the training of our residents.
As the program director, I want a reliable service that can handle the complexities of OB GYN residency scheduling, so I can focus more on education and less on logistics.
I'm coordinating the OB GYN residency schedules and need a solution that integrates with our existing tools like QGenda, while also ensuring all duty hours and preferences are respected.
